{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323140647487D4969555C3DE3F17C"}"},"total":2137},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7494788462406599448","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉这小说可以拍剧了，庆余年原班人马，陈道明演皇帝，刘端端演三皇子，张若均演主角，李小冉演他亲娘，还有好多演员，我已经把一些演员代入脑补了，我滴妈，作者加油啊，真的有内味了，尤其这剧情，不拖拉，节奏紧密，幽默风趣，杀伐果断 可以的哇，希望不要烂尾，加油","text_exts":[{"e":55,"s":53,"text":"演员","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%BC%94%E5%91%98&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742460073DE3F17C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227494788462406599448%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227357889084515175449%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%BC%94%E5%91%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745024442,"group_id":"7357889084515175449","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+oWnrCDbwyAUuGMnSJW+UwJTr9GmkYhTvaISWJmP3MB","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c06fc4fd282a48dbbbba4330643d2623~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789824&x-signature=MMbwkdb6ViMqD%2F7REp8kayy6NOc%3D","user_id":"4344893502394719","user_name":"谁见了不递烟"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4344893502394719","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7357889084515175449","book_info":{"abstract":"王慧天，自卑的无灵根患者，剑术通神。自他下山起，世间无安宁！
魔祖：“啥？他要下山？快取我袈裟来。”
妖族：“该死，我儿肉嫩，快将他躲起来。”
禁地：“今日大扫除，明日全体保持静默，胆敢违令者，扔到山上去”
向天地讨封，向鬼神要钱。
